rulings.Case Title: KRISTINA M. DOORLAG et al VS. VINCENT PASQUINI et al

DEFENDANT VINCENT PASQUINI and JAYMI TEDDY's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Defendants' Peremptory Challenge filed on September 25, 2013 was accepted by Honorable Ronald Evans Quidachay. Per the order of the Presiding Judge hearing on Defendants' Motion to Strike is transferred to Department 504 to be heard by Honorable Peter J. Busch on October 10, 2013 at 9:30 a.m. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: REBECCA JEAN ALONZI et al VS. CHRISTOPHER J. COSTELLO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Documents From Chad H. Mcarthur
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, September 30, 2013, line 3. DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER COSTELLO and COZ CORPORATION's Motion To Compel Documents From Chad H. Mcarthur GRANTED as follows: (1) Mr. McArthur to produce additional documents (to the extent he has them) in response t categories 1-7, 9, 12-16, 18, 20, 22, 23, and 26-33 of the subpoena, but excluding (a) documents pertaining to plaintiff Alonzi's financial condition as distinguished from his financial condition of Seasonal Elegance; (b) confidential communications between Mr. McCormick and Mr. McArthur for the purpose of Mr. McCormick's providing legal advice to Mr. McArthur about the subpoena or to plaintiffs about the transaction at issue or other matters on which Mr. McCormick served as counsel to plaintiffs; and (c) Mr. McArthur's work produced generated in preparing plaintiffs' income tax returns; (2) Plaintiffs and Mr. McArthur to supplements their response to identify which produces documents are responsive to which category of the subpoena; (3) Plaintiffs and Mr. McArthur to provide a privilege log listing all documents withheld on the assertion of the attorney-client privilege or income tax return privilege, with enough information for the parties and, if necessary, the Ourt to assess the basis for the privilege asserted; (4) the supplemental production of document, supplemental response to the subpoena, and the privilege log to be provided twenty days of Notice of Entry of Order; (5) No sanctions. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: REBECCA JEAN ALONZI et al VS. CHRISTOPHER J. COSTELLO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Further Responses And Compliance With Pltf'S Req.'S For Producion Of Documents And Things, Set No. One
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, September 30, 2013, line 3. PLAINTIFF REBECCA ALONZI and SEASONAL ELEGANCE CATERING, LLC, D.B.A. REBECCA's Motion To Compel Further Responses And Compliance With Plaintiff's Req.'s For Producion Of Documents And Things, Set No. One GRANTED in part, DENIED in part and hearing required in part. For the hearing required portion parties must appear at 9:00 a.m. and engage in meet and confer to report their progress at 9:30 a.m. hearing. Motion is DENIED as to requests 2, 8, 11, 13; Motion is GRANTED as to requests 23, 26, 27, 26, 29, 30, 34. Defendants must specify that a diligent search for documents was made and no more documents were located. Defendants must produce privilege log and Defendants must produce unredacted documents for attorney's eyes only. Responses are due within 10 days of notice of entry of order. If Plaintiff disagrees with the extent of redactions, P may bring a follow-up motion. Hearing Required as to requests 20, 21, 22 - Plaintiff must specify what documents are sought. No sanctions. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANOUSHIRAVAN MASSOUMI VS. THOMAS MURRAY JR et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, September 30, 2013, line 7. PLAINTIFF ANOUSHIRAVAN MASSOUMI's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED. Plaintiff shifted burden and Defendant failed to present admissible evidence to create a triable issue of fact. Specifically, Defendant failed to present evidence that P is not the owner of the beneficial title and Defendant failed to cite any authority for the proposition landlord-tenant relationship is terminated by virtue of non-payment of rent directly to the landlord. = (501/REQ)
